title: Create: Big Contraptions
description: Lets you carry and render contraptions with lots of data
body: # Disclaimer This is NOT a Create addon, the mod does not depend on it. It only fixes https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-185901 . It's created for the purpose of solving specifically the big contraptions that players carry and render, therefore the name "Create:", but it's not a Create mod addon. # Information It's a client-only mod. It makes playerdata be able to get to 10MB instead the vanilla 2MB Error without the mod: # Thanks to XLPackets 1.16, I ported that feature from that version of XLPackets. Unlike XLPackets, this mod is client side only.
